title: Carlost Blocks
description: This mod adds new blocks in different colors that allow the player to build new structures in their world and bring new ideas to reality that are not possible in normal Minecraft with the limited blocks.
body:
Description

This mod adds new blocks in different colors that allow the player to build new structures in their world and bring new ideas to reality that are not possible in normal Minecraft with the limited blocks.

Feel free to include Carlost Blocks in modpacks.

 

 

 
CONTENT
